offer: For amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual report generation causes late audits and potential penalties. We automate compliance-ready report generation instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in generating compliance-ready audit reports from raw procurement data.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for amazon sellers
Indie Hackers discussions on report generation
DM outreach to 20-50 amazon sellers with demo
Community forums for amazon sellers sharing tools
try_it: Let users try template-based report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly progress updates in communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
